items.name_en: 【M92649 Murakami Collaboration Limited Edition White Three-Color Mahjong Purse】
items.name_cn:
【M92649 Murakami Collaboration Limited Edition White Three-Color Mahjong Purse】
Size: 21x13x3cm.
Why choose the M92649 White Three-Color Mahjong Purse? Because I really think it's great: it's lightweight and easy to carry; it has a large capacity, fitting a phone, earphones, power bank, lipstick, wallet, compact powder, etc.; and it looks beautiful, giving a very stylish look.
A bag that is good-looking, versatile, exquisite, durable, and lightweight is a must-have for home, travel, dates, business, or any occasion. You can handle it with ease.
(M92649 White Three-Color Mahjong Purse) adds no unnecessary clutter, pursuing a design aesthetic of simplicity. The lines are smooth, and the shape is classic and generous. The details reveal a retro flavor. Simple yet not simplistic, fashionable and atmospheric while retaining delicacy and refinement, reflecting a sweet and charming retro fashion sense, tailored for you.
Murakami uses a unique fashion perspective to inject 33-color elements into every part of the bag. The classic magic is irreplaceable, and the design spirit that is hard to surpass is the secret behind everyone's madness.
Versatile for commuting, adapting to any change with one bag. The versatile color highlights your elegant temperament. The simple style is classic and atmospheric. No need for extra decoration. The understated design shows confidence.
Good-looking is just that simple.
Have an unexpected encounter with the M92649 White Three-Color Mahjong Purse,
and meet the 'you' of this moment.
Individualistic yet not ostentatious, noble yet not flashy.
A woman is like a handbag,
No matter where you are,
You are a piece of 'art'.
We,
Offer warmth to you,
Offer quality and nobility to you,
Offer temperament and elegance to you,
You are the best.

items.name_en: New M40489
items.name_cn:
New M40489
Featuring the classic Louis Vuitton Monogram canvas, this apron bag is trimmed with natural cowhide and gold hardware, harmoniously designed. The unique silhouette is inspired by the iconic travel trunk. It has two top handles and a pad made of round dry leather. Decorated with the Louis Vuitton logo, plus seasonal bright pink and orange accent details, this item features a detachable strap and can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody bag. 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width)
